---
title: "YoubinHe"
image: images/HYB_2026.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: youbinhe0607@gmail.com
      href: mailto:youbinhe0607@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: binbin's GitHub
      href: https://github.com/HeYoubin
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-r5foIsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-8018-0909
    # - icon: brands zhihu
    #   text: 知乎
    #   href: https://www.zhihu.com/people/arlionn/
    # - icon: brands weibo
    #   text: 微博
    #   href: https://weibo.com/arlionn
    - icon: brands xiaohongshu
      text: 小红书
      href: https://www.xiaohongshu.com/user/profile/63b1162b00000000260070aa
    # - icon: solid user
    #   text: 工作主页
    #   href: https://lingnan.sysu.edu.cn/faculty/LianYujun
    # - icon: brands home
    #   text: 连享会
    #   href: https://www.lianxh.cn
    - icon: 📝
      text: CV
      href: HYB_CV_V0.4.pdf  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Hello! I am Youbin He. 

I am a **Remote Sensing Algorithm Engineer** based in China, specializing in the development of **automated data preprocessing pipelines** and applied algorithms for **fire and agricultural monitoring**. My current research interest lies at the intersection of **Machine Learning** and **Ecological Remote Sensing Big Data**. 

During my undergraduate studies, I served as a **Research Team Leader**, spearheading projects on "Multi-source Remote Sensing Data Applications for Ecological Environments" and "Urban Development Analysis". I was also a core member of the "Intelligent Geospatial Scene Interpretation" team. My academic dedication was recognized with multiple **National Third Prizes** in the prestigious **Esri-Cup Chinese College Students GIS Software Development Contest**.

I am currently seeking **M.S. and Ph.D. opportunities** in **AI4RS** and **GeoAI**. 
Please visit my [Research & Projects](Res_Pro.qmd) page for a deeper dive into my work.

Beyond coding and research, I am passionate about photography and cooking. Feel free to follow my social media to see the world (and food) through my lens.

## Key topics

- AI4RS
- GeoAI
- Remote Sensing / Geographic Big Data Analysis
- Ecological Remote Sensing

## News

- Feb 2026: Submitted a new paper on Analysis of Driving Factors of Forest and Grassland Fires in Southwest China(Under Review). 
- Jan 2025: My paper on **Research on the spatial distribution and influencing factors of B&Bs in Liangshan prefecture based on GIS spatial analysis and spatial econometric model** has been published in ICMIC 2024.
- May 2024: Joined XingTuZhiHui as a Remote Sensing Algorithm Engineer.
- 2019-2023: Bachelor of Science, Shandong Jiaotong University, China, majoring in Geographic Information Science.

:::
